title: OpenAI Codex
summary: We’ve created an improved version of OpenAI Codex, our AI system that translates natural language to code, and we are releasing it through our API in private beta starting today.
summaryZh: 我们创建了OpenAI Codex的改进版本，这是我们将自然语言转换为代码的人工智能系统，我们从今天开始通过我们的API发布私有测试版。
highlights: We’ve created an improved version of OpenAI Codex, our AI system that translates natural language to code, and we are releasing it through our API in private beta starting today.
highlightsZh: 我们创建了OpenAI Codex的改进版本，这是我们将自然语言转换为代码的人工智能系统，我们从今天开始通过我们的API发布私有测试版。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。
